query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `customers` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `company` varchar(255),
  `type` enum('b2b','museum','industry','private','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'b2b',
  `email` varchar(320),
  `phone` varchar(64),
  `address` text,
  `notes` text,
  `sevdesk_contact_id` varchar(128),
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `customers_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `lead_sources` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `type` enum('website','google_ads','referral','direct','social','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'website',
  `monthlyCost` decimal(10,2),
  `notes` text,
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `lead_sources_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `projects` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `project_number` varchar(64),
  `title` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `type` enum('serial_part','spare_part','museum','consulting','cad_work','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'other',
  `status` enum('inquiry','calculation','offer','order','production','shipping','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'inquiry',
  `customer_id` int,
  `lead_source_id` int,
  `drive_folder_url` varchar(1024),
  `notes` text,
  `internal_notes` text,
  `deadline` timestamp,
  `total_ek` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `total_vk` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `total_margin` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `margin_percent` decimal(6,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `projects_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `project_items` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `project_id` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `quantity` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `material` varchar(255),
  `technology` enum('fdm','sla','sls','cnc','laser','painting','coating','cad_service','other') DEFAULT 'fdm',
  `production_type` enum('in_house','external') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'external',
  `ek_price` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `vk_price` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `margin_percent` decimal(6,2) DEFAULT 0,
  `notes` text,
  `supplier_id` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `project_items_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `suppliers` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `company` varchar(255),
  `email` varchar(320),
  `phone` varchar(64),
  `capabilities` json,
  `rating` int DEFAULT 3,
  `notes` text,
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `suppliers_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `rfqs` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `project_id` int NOT NULL,
  `project_item_id` int,
  `title` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `status` enum('draft','sent','responses_received','closed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `deadline` timestamp,
  `supplier_ids` json,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `rfqs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `rfq_responses` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `rfq_id` int NOT NULL,
  `supplier_id` int NOT NULL,
  `price` decimal(12,2),
  `delivery_days` int,
  `notes` text,
  `is_selected` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `received_at` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `rfq_responses_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `shipments` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `project_id` int NOT NULL,
  `carrier` varchar(128),
  `tracking_number` varchar(256),
  `shipped_at` timestamp,
  `estimated_delivery` timestamp,
  `delivered_at` timestamp,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `shipments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `consultation_entries` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `project_id` int,
  `customer_id` int,
  `type` enum('material','process','surface','design','technical','general') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'general',
  `title` varchar(512) NOT NULL,
  `content` text NOT NULL,
  `tags` json,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `consultation_entries_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `materials_library` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `category` enum('plastic','metal','composite','surface_treatment','process','other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'other',
  `properties` text,
  `applications` text,
  `advantages` text,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `materials_library_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
